message:
fix(runtime,link,session): fix reactor priority, obligation lifecycle, and type safety

Runtime Hooks:
- Reorder reactor hook priority: ghost reactor takes precedence in
  deterministic builds (ASX_DETERMINISTIC) for reproducibility, native
  reactor used as fallback in non-deterministic builds
- Update test expectations for conditional reactor preference

Link/Session Obligation Lifecycle:
- Fix obligation tracking: obligations now persist until the initiator
  receives the response, not immediately after recv_request
- Add cycle completion with response send/recv in tests
- Add intermediate state assertions to verify obligation persistence

IO Driver:
- Add unsigned suffix to integer literals for type safety (999u, i+1u)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
